name: Laundry
description: Wash day on the line — shirts and towels pinned under a breeze, swinging into a new hang with every redraw.

code.style: --garment: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4)); --rule: ( border-top: calc(18px / @Y) solid var(--color5); box-sizing: border-box; /* garment and pin share one emitted sway angle from the line */ --sw: @r(-8deg, 8deg); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: @rand(22%, 34%); top: 0; width: @rand(34%, 50%); height: @rand(42%, 64%); border-radius: 0 0 @rand(14%, 30%) @rand(14%, 30%); background: var(--garment); transform-origin: 50% 0%; transform: rotate(@var(--sw)); transition: ease 700ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 44%; top: -2%; width: 12%; height: 7%; border-radius: 99px; background: var(--color5); transform-origin: 50% 0%; transform: rotate(@var(--sw)); transition: ease 700ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
